race.description: Visy Logistics Tom Patton Cup Handicap
race.comment: ROCCO LINI (7) was left with a lot of ground to bridge in town at the latest but picked up strongly to make significant headway. This doesn't look as tough, he drops in weight and gets the key booking in of Boudvillain. A lot to like. LINE OF FIRE (2) found it too tough in town last time and is much better suited back to the country circuit. Has good early toe and gets in well with the 3kg claim. Sure to give backers a sight. ARISTOCRAT (6) found plenty when challenged and went on with the job nicely to score at Canberra last time. Added trip won't bother. KODIAK BEAR (4) has switched yards since finishing down the track over a much longer trip at Geelong. Freshened with 56 days, keeping the legs ticking over with a trial and drops back in trip. Could fill a spot.
